chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4924 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 16.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG along with Mr. Allah Ditta, Litigation Officer, School Education & literacy Department, Government of Sindh. ------------- We have seen the order dated 26.03.2025 of the School Education Department, Government of Sindh, which deals with the petitioner, as such this petition has now become infructuous and is accordingly dismissed. However, the petitioner is at liberty to challenge the aforesaid order, if so advised. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
